notes: Seed corpus for Czech spelling, diacritics, short dialogue, and learner examples.
Keep broad corpus text separate from curated Caatuu training examples.
Wikipedia text is useful for modern Czech spelling, but it is encyclopedic and should not dominate conversational examples.
Public-domain books are useful for diacritics and syntax, but older texts can be archaic.

local_sources.description: Existing Caatuu Czech dictionary entries and example uses.

books.title: R.U.R. (Rossum's Universal Robots)
books.author: Karel Čapek
books.license: Project Gutenberg public-domain text, check local reuse requirements before redistribution
books.description: Small Czech book/drama sample. Keep as a minor source because its style is literary.
